governing_law.exact_text: The execution, validity, construction, enforcement and the settlement of any disputes herefrom shall be governed by PRC Laws.

non_compete.value: Party A agrees not to enter into any form of cooperation with Qihoo 360 during the cooperation period.
non_compete.exact_text: During the cooperation between the parties, Party A agrees not to enter into any form of cooperation with Qihoo 360, unless Party A needs such cooperation with Qihoo 360 for business or technology and Party B has provided its prior consent.

fields.notice_period: one month prior to the expiry of the Cooperation Term
